message:
test(unit): expand inline tests for config, wezterm (+64) (wa-1u90p.7.1)

config.rs (+30): LogFormat Display/FromStr/serde/default, SyncDirection Copy/eq/serde,
DistributedAuthMode requires_token/requires_mtls/serde, DcgMode/DcgDenyPolicy serde
all variants, GeneralConfig/IngestConfig/SyncConfig/DistributedConfig/DistributedTlsConfig
defaults, CommandGateConfig defaults, CompactionPromptConfig agents, PatternsConfig defaults,
PackOverride defaults, SearchConfig/SearchDaemonConfig defaults, is_valid_agent_key,
extract_prompt_placeholders empty/valid/unterminated.

wezterm.rs (+34): PaneSize debug_clone, CursorVisibility Copy/serde PascalCase,
CwdInfo default/parse local/remote/empty/plain/host-only/serde, PaneInfo effective_rows/cols
flat fallback/inferred_domain from cwd/extra fields, SplitDirection/MoveDirection all 4
pairwise, WaitMatcher substring/regex matches/description, WaitOptions default/clone,
WaitResult matched/timed_out eq/ne, CodexSummaryMarkers complete/debug_clone,
CodexSummaryWaitResult clone_eq, WeztermHandleSource clone.
